final_prompt.prompt:
Create a realistic screenshot of a 抖音 live-stream featuring a young woman resembling 神仙姐姐 holding a sign during the broadcast.

Style/medium: needs a realistic 抖音 live-stream screenshot aesthetic — exact UI detail execution is yours
Composition: must be 9:16 vertical, with live-stream overlay UI elements (viewer count, comments, like animations, username bar) framing the scene
Subject: must include a young woman resembling 神仙姐姐 holding a handwritten sign facing the camera
Scene/backdrop: needs an indoor live-stream room atmosphere — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, flattering live-stream studio lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign she is holding
Constraints: must preserve 抖音 live-stream UI layout with realistic on-screen overlays; sign text must be clearly legible
Avoid:
